name: gemini-web-bridge
description: Use the user's logged-in Gemini Web session as an auxiliary analysis and public-video understanding tool.

interface.shortDescription: Use Gemini Web for auxiliary analysis
interface.longDescription: Lets Codex send a minimal scoped prompt, optionally with public URLs, to a dedicated locally controlled Gemini Web browser session and receive the complete raw answer. Codex controls prompting, quality judgment, follow-up, and cross-checking. Experimental and currently macOS-only.
defaultPrompt: 当 Gemini Web 的公开视频或网页能力能实质帮助分析或验证请求时，使用它作为辅助工具
